calendar.description: Senate Government Operations and Political Subdivisions Hearing

general_provisions: This bill amends provisions relating to elections.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>beginning on January 1, 2027, prohibits a county clerk's or election officer's name from:<hr><ltbullet1>inclusion in the official endorsement for a ballot;<hr><ltbullet1>inclusion on a return envelope for a ballot; or<hr><ltbullet1>inclusion on a ballot, except to the extent that the county clerk or election officer is listed as a candidate on the ballot;<hr><ltbullet>enacts a temporary provision regarding the computation of time;<hr><ltbullet>prohibits certain action by a county clerk;<hr><ltbullet>requires the lieutenant governor to create a written conflict of interest avoidance plan;<hr><ltbullet>establishes the crime of electronic communications abuse of elections or elected office;<hr><ltbullet>subject to certain exceptions, provides that, when poll workers verify a voter's identity in relation to a ballot returned by mail, the poll workers are required to verify the signature on the affidavit in addition to the last four digits of an identification number;<hr><ltbullet>requires an incumbent county clerk who is running for reelection to contract with another county clerk to provide certain services in relation to verifying candidate signatures for the race;<hr><ltbullet>permits the use of campaign funds for certain goods or services relating to security; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
